metadata.title: FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions | Perrine Huon
metadata.description: Answers to your questions about website creation, local SEO, my services and working process.

header.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
header.title: FAQ
header.description: Answers to your questions about my services, working process and local SEO

cta.title: Haven't found your answer?
cta.description: Contact me directly and I'll get back to you within 24 hours

1.question: How long does it take to create a website?
1.answer: The creation time depends on the project's complexity. A simple showcase website can be delivered in 2-3 weeks, while a custom e-commerce site or web application may take 6 to 12 weeks. I always provide a detailed timeline after our initial discussion.

2.question: How does geo-targeted SEO work?
2.answer: Geo-targeted SEO optimizes your visibility for specific local searches. I work on content optimization, meta tags, creating pages targeted by city or geographic area, and integration with Google My Business to improve your local ranking.

3.question: Do you offer maintenance services?
3.answer: Yes, I offer monthly maintenance packages including security updates, continuous optimization, automatic backups, and priority technical support.

4.question: What are your rates?
4.answer: My rates vary depending on the nature and scope of the project. I provide personalized quotes after an initial discussion to fully understand your needs and objectives. Feel free to contact me to discuss your project.

5.question: Do you work with clients outside of France?
5.answer: Yes, I work with clients worldwide. Most exchanges are done online (video calls, email), which facilitates remote collaboration. SEO can be optimized for any geographic area.

6.question: What technologies do you use?
6.answer: I use modern and high-performance technologies like Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. The choice of technologies is always adapted to your specific needs and project objectives.
